ast.name: log
ast.source: Multi-page downloads require JSZip to be bundled: https://www.npmjs.com/package/jszip
ast.target: 多页下载需要打包 JSZip：https://www.npmjs.com/package/jszip

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Use a slash ("/") in the name to create the Code File in a subfolder (group). Example: "groupname/codename".
ast.target: 在名称中使用斜杠（\"/\"）可在子文件夹（组）中创建代码文件。示例：\"groupname/codename\"。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Will be added as metadata with the key "code description".
ast.target: 将作为键为 \"code description\" 的元数据添加。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: List of properties, one per line, for which suggestions should be surppressed. This is useful for dimensions which are intended for unique content that is not going to be repeated in other Code Files or Extraction Files.
ast.target: 属性列表，每行一个，用于应禁止建议的属性。这对于旨在包含不会在其他代码文件或提取文件中重复的唯一内容的维度很有用。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Minimum width of keys in the list of properties, in percent.
ast.target: 属性列表中键的最小宽度，以百分比为单位。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: For example, instead of "20 Codes," the statusbar will display "20C."
ast.target: 例如，状态栏将显示“20C”而不是“20个代码”。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Location where the Code Files are stored.

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When selecting a code to assign, show a count of how often the code has already been assigned. (Note that this is a methodological decision, as it may influence your choice of codes.)
ast.target: 选择要分配的代码时，显示该代码已被分配的次数。（请注意，这是一个方法论决定，因为它可能会影响您对代码的选择。）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When selecting a code to assign, method by which the codes are ordered. (Note that this is a methodological decision, as it may influence your choice of codes.)
ast.target: 选择要分配的代码时，代码的排序方式。（请注意，这是一个方法论决定，因为它可能会影响您对代码的选择。）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Location where the Extraction Files are stored.

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When selecting an extraction type, show a count of how often the type has been extracted.(Note that this is a methodological decision, as it may influence your choice of codes.)
ast.target: 选择提取类型时，显示该类型已被提取的次数。（请注意，这是一个方法论决定，因为它可能会影响您对代码的选择。）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When creating a new extraction, a new split window opens. This setting determines where that window opens.
ast.target: 创建新提取时，会打开一个新的分屏窗口。此设置决定该窗口的打开位置。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Property which should be displayed when selecting an Extraction File, for instance when merging Extraction Files. If a list of properties is specified, the first one that exists in the Extraction File is used. For a list of properties, enter one property per line.
ast.target: 选择提取文件时（例如合并提取文件时）应显示的属性。如果指定了属性列表，则使用提取文件中存在的第一个属性。要输入属性列表，请每行输入一个属性。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Separator used when exporting extractions as CSV file.
ast.target: 将提取导出为CSV文件时使用的分隔符。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Location where overviews, progress, and exports are placed.
ast.target: 概览、进度和导出文件的存放位置。

ast.name: setPlaceholder
ast.source: Add paragraph to following Extraction File:
ast.target: 将段落添加到以下提取文件：

ast.name: setPlaceholder
ast.source: One property per line, the first existing property is used.
ast.target: 每行一个属性，将使用第一个存在的属性。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Tried to use the 'fill' option without the 'Filler' plugin enabled. Please import and register the 'Filler' plugin and make sure it is not disabled in the options
ast.target: 尝试使用“填充”选项，但未启用“填充器”插件。请导入并注册“填充器”插件，并确保它在选项中未被禁用。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source:
Selection contains highlights.
Overlapping highlights are not supported.
ast.target: 选区包含高亮。\n不支持重叠高亮。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Current file is not a Data File.
ast.target: 当前文件不是数据文件。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Data File already marked as read.
ast.target: 数据文件已标记为已读。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Marked current Data File as read.
ast.target: 已将当前数据文件标记为已读。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Error: could not find Extraction Folder.
ast.target: 错误：找不到提取文件夹。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Failed to create new Code File.

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: You must be in a Data File to assign a code.
ast.target: 您必须在数据文件中才能分配代码。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Must be in a Code File to delete the code everywhere.
ast.target: 必须在代码文件中才能删除所有地方的代码。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: No other codes have been created yet.

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: You must be in a Code File for this.
ast.target: 您必须在代码文件中才能执行此操作。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: You must be in a Code File.

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Cannot unassign code: no ID found at current line.
ast.target: 无法取消分配代码：在当前行未找到ID。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: You must be in a Data File to unassign a code.
ast.target: 您必须在数据文件中才能取消分配代码。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: No extractions have been created yet.

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: You must be in a Data File to make an extraction.
ast.target: 您必须在数据文件中才能进行提取。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: No extraction type found (file to be extracted has no parent.)
ast.target: 未找到提取类型（待提取的文件没有父级）。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: No other extractions have been created yet.

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: You must be in an Extraction File for this.
ast.target: 您必须在提取文件中才能执行此操作。

ast.name: label
ast.source: % of new Extractions to all Extraction actions
ast.target: 新提取占所有提取操作的百分比

ast.name: name
ast.target: 打开随机未读数据文件

ast.name: name
ast.target: 显示数据分析进度文件

ast.name: name
ast.source: Mark current Data File as read
ast.target: 将当前数据文件标记为已读

ast.name: name
ast.target: 显示提取的理论饱和度

ast.name: name
ast.source: Delete Code File and all references to it
ast.target: 删除代码文件及其所有引用

ast.name: name
ast.source: Merge another Code File into current Code File
ast.target: 将另一个代码文件合并到当前代码文件中

ast.name: name
ast.source: Add paragraph as source to existing Extraction File
ast.target: 将段落作为源添加到现有提取文件

ast.name: name
ast.source: Merge another Extraction File into current Extraction File
ast.target: 将另一个提取文件合并到当前提取文件中

ast.name: text
ast.source: Every line will result in a new Code File.
ast.target: 每行将生成一个新的代码文件。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Use a slash ("/") in the name to create the Code File in a subfolder (group).
ast.target: 在名称中使用斜杠（“/”）可在子文件夹（组）中创建代码文件。
